bird.name: 艾博特氏紫椋鸟
bird.summary: 艾博特氏紫椋鸟（Cinnyricinclus femoralis）是椋鸟科的一种鸟，在坦桑尼亚和肯尼亚发现。艾博特氏紫椋鸟在亚热带或热带的雨林中生活，由于栖息地面积不断减小，存活面临威胁。 参考文献 BirdLife International 2004.

locations.name: 肯尼亚
locations.summary: 肯亞共和國（斯瓦希里語：Jamhuri ya Kenya；英語：Republic of Kenya），通稱肯亞（Kenya），是位於東非，濒临印度洋，與索馬里、埃塞俄比亚、南蘇丹、烏干達、坦桑尼亚接壤，面积约58万平方公里。肯亞人口约52…

locations.name: 坦桑尼亚
locations.summary: 坦桑尼亚联合共和国（斯瓦希里語：Jamhuri ya Muungano wa Tanzania；英語：United Republic of Tanzania），通稱坦尚尼亞（斯瓦希里語和英語：Tanzania），是位于赤道以南的东非国家。…

relations.subject: 艾博特氏紫椋鸟
relations.evidence: It is found in Kenya and Tanzania

relations.subject: 艾博特氏紫椋鸟
relations.evidence: It is found in Kenya and Tanzania

relations.subject: 艾博特氏紫椋鸟
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: 艾博特氏紫椋鸟
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss, and its population is estimated at 2500–9999. This species, at long, is the smallest species of starling.Starlings & Mynas (Helm Identification Guide) by Chris Feare
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 艾博特氏紫椋鸟
relations.evidence: Deforestation due to illegal logging and agriculture are considered major threats to Abbott's starling
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
